title: Dhammapada, Chapter 6: The Wise
description: Chapter 6 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 6 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: If a traveler does not find a companion who is better or equal, let him firmly pursue his solitary journey. There is no companionship with a fool.
